doctor_description: Centrilobular emphysema (no severity qualifier); LDCT recommended
validator_description: Mild centrilobular emphysema; LDCT recommended
management_impact: None — LDCT concordant; QMM23 satisfied by both
notes: Doctor omits 'mild' qualifier; both recommend LDCT. QMM23 met.

validator_description: Thickening of walls of segmental and subsegmental bronchi
management_impact: None — consistent with chronic airway disease; no management change
notes: Doctor omits bronchial wall thickening noted by validator. No management impact.

validator_description: Hiatal hernia
management_impact: None — clinically relevant incidental finding; no immediate management action required
notes: Doctor omits hiatal hernia. Documentation gap only.

doctor_description: Moderate degenerative changes thoracic spine with osteophyte formation
validator_description: Moderate degenerative changes + diffuse ossification of anterior longitudinal ligament; impression: DISH
management_impact: None — DISH is incidental; no management change
notes: Doctor notes degenerative changes and osteophytes but omits DISH/anterior longitudinal ligament ossification.

validator_description: Osteosclerotic lesion T4 vertebral body 9mm, unchanged
management_impact: None — described as unchanged; consistent with bone island, no follow-up needed
notes: Doctor omits T4 osteosclerotic lesion. Likely bone island; no management change.

doctor_description: Thoracic aorta 4.1 cm — aneurysmal dilatation with wall calcification and S-shaped tortuosity
validator_description: Thoracic aorta 4.1 cm — dilatation with wall calcification and S-shaped tortuosity
management_impact: Doctor overcalls 4.1 cm aorta as 'aneurysmal' — conventional threshold is ≥4.5 cm; could trigger unnecessary vascular surveillance
notes: 4.1 cm thoracic aorta does not meet standard definition for aortic aneurysm (≥4.5 cm). Doctor's 'aneurysmal' overcall vs validator's 'dilatation' is clinically relevant but no immediate management change expected.

doctor_description: Thyroid left lobe 1.1×0.9 cm — thyroid US recommended per ACR White Paper 2014
validator_description: Thyroid left lobe up to 1.1 cm — no need for further follow-up per ACR White Paper 2015
management_impact: Doctor triggers unnecessary thyroid US for a 1.1 cm nodule that does not meet the US threshold per updated 2015 ACR guidance (≥1.5 cm for most patients)
notes: Doctor cites ACR 2014; validator cites 2015 update. For incidental 1.1 cm thyroid nodule without high-risk features, 2015 ACR guidance supports no follow-up. Doctor's US recommendation is an overcall consistent with Measure 406 spirit.

doctor_description: Severe coronary calcification; PCP referral included
validator_description: Severe coronary calcification; PCP referral included
management_impact: None — ACRad44 satisfied by both
notes: Concordant. ACRad44 met.

finding_category: Part-solid nodule — size and Fleischner follow-up interval
doctor_description: Previously not identified part-solid nodule up to 3mm image 76; Fleischner: CT follow-up in 12 months
validator_description: Previously not identified part-solid nodule up to 4mm image 76; Fleischner: CT follow-up 3–6 months to confirm persistence, if stable CT at 2 and 4 years
management_impact: Doctor recommends 12-month follow-up — WRONG per Fleischner 2017 for new part-solid nodule. Correct interval is 3–6 months. 6–9 month delay in initial reassessment could miss early growth of slow-growing adenocarcinoma. Measure 364 violated.
notes: Two-part discrepancy: size (3mm vs 4mm) and Fleischner interval (12m vs correct 3–6m). For new part-solid nodule, Fleischner 2017 mandates initial CT at 3–6 months to confirm persistence.

validator_description: Part-solid nodule up to 2mm image 78
management_impact: None — 2mm part-solid nodule does not require follow-up per Fleischner; documentation gap only
notes: Doctor misses second part-solid nodule (2mm, image 78). No mandatory follow-up needed for <6mm part-solid.

validator_description: Paravertebral area of osteophyte-induced pulmonary fibrosis — clinically insignificant
management_impact: None — validator explicitly calls it clinically insignificant
notes: Doctor omits osteophyte-induced pulmonary fibrosis. Clinically insignificant per validator.

validator_description: Both lobes of thyroid gland heterogeneous and enlarged; further evaluation with thyroid US recommended if not already obtained
management_impact: Doctor misses bilateral thyroid enlargement (likely goiter); US recommendation omitted. No acute management change but clinically relevant documentation gap.
notes: Bilateral heterogeneous thyroid enlargement missed by doctor. US recommendation by validator is appropriate. No urgency.

doctor_description: PA dilated 3.5 cm, may suggest pulmonary hypertension
validator_description: PA dilated 3.5 cm, may suggest pulmonary hypertension; consider cardiac echo
management_impact: Validator adds 'consider cardiac echo'; doctor omits. Clinically appropriate recommendation omitted but not definitively management-changing.
notes: Both identify PA dilation. Validator adds echo recommendation. Minor clinical omission.

doctor_description: Severe coronary calcification; PCP referral included
validator_description: Severe coronary calcification; PCP referral included
management_impact: None — ACRad44 satisfied by both
notes: Concordant. ACRad44 met.

anatomical_location: Left upper lobe and left lower lobe
validator_description: LUL GGN 3mm (unchanged); LLL GGN 3mm (unchanged); LLL solid 2mm×2 (unchanged). Fleischner: CT at 2 and 4 years.
management_impact: Doctor misses multiple bilateral GGNs and issues blanket 'no further CT follow-up.' Fleischner requires CT at 2 and 4 years for stable GGNs. Management-changing omission. Measure 364 violated.
notes: Doctor's report misses multiple LUL and LLL GGNs stable on follow-up study. Fleischner 2017 requires 2+4 year documented surveillance. Doctor's 'no follow-up' is incorrect for this case.

doctor_description: Bilateral micronodules up to 3mm (non-specific)
validator_description: Group of micronodules (tree-in-bud pattern) images 157–169 — partially resolved bronchiolitis
management_impact: None — partially resolved; no acute management change
notes: Doctor describes non-specific bilateral micronodules; validator identifies tree-in-bud pattern = partially resolved bronchiolitis. Specific pattern not captured by doctor.

doctor_description: Aortic valve calcification
validator_description: Aortic and mitral valve calcification
management_impact: None — incidental finding; no management change
notes: Doctor documents aortic valve calcification only; validator adds mitral. Minor documentation gap.

doctor_description: Severe degenerative changes of the thoracic spine
validator_description: Moderate degenerative changes of the thoracic spine
management_impact: None — subjective severity grading; no management difference
notes: Doctor says 'severe'; validator says 'moderate.' Minor severity descriptor disagreement.

finding_category: Rib fractures — laterality and healing status
doctor_description: Healing fractures of the left ribs
validator_description: Multiple healed rib fractures bilaterally
management_impact: None — both document rib fractures; doctor underestimates extent (left only vs bilateral)
notes: Doctor limits fractures to left side; validator documents bilateral. Doctor says 'healing'; validator says 'healed.' Extent underestimated.

doctor_description: Left kidney mass density 8 HU, 6.6×7.8 cm — no further follow-up per ACR 2018
validator_description: Left renal cyst density 8 HU, 6.6×7.8 cm — no further follow-up per ACR 2018
management_impact: None — identical management recommendation; 8 HU confirms simple cyst
notes: Doctor calls it 'mass'; validator correctly says 'cyst' (8 HU = simple cyst). Same management.

doctor_description: Severe CAC all four vessels; PCP referral included
validator_description: Severe CAC all four vessels; PCP referral included
management_impact: None — ACRad44 satisfied by both
notes: Concordant. ACRad44 met.

doctor_description: Small left pleural effusion
management_impact: Minor overcall — validator explicitly states no pleural effusion; no workup triggered for small effusion
notes: Doctor reports small left pleural effusion; validator explicitly documents no pleural effusion. Overcall with no management impact.

doctor_description: Moderately enlarged heart (cardiomegaly)
management_impact: Doctor's overcall of moderate cardiomegaly would trigger unnecessary cardiology referral and echocardiography. Validator explicitly says no cardiomegaly. Significant overreport.
notes: Direct contradiction — doctor reports moderate cardiomegaly; validator explicitly says no cardiomegaly. False positive finding with management consequences. Grade 4.

doctor_description: No significant pericardial effusion
validator_description: Trace pericardial effusion up to 8mm
management_impact: None — both indicate clinically insignificant pericardial fluid
notes: Doctor says 'no significant'; validator says 'trace 8mm.' Both agree clinically insignificant. Grade 2b.

doctor_description: 8mm×12mm — benign adenoma, no further imaging follow-up; consider biochemical evaluation
validator_description: 8mm — <1 cm short axis; no follow-up per ACR White Paper 2017 (no biochemical evaluation)
management_impact: Doctor adds biochemical evaluation not indicated for <1 cm adrenal lesion per ACR 2017. Could trigger unnecessary endocrinology referral. Measure 405 MIPS violation.
notes: ACR White Paper 2017: adrenal lesion <1 cm short axis requires no follow-up and no biochemical eval. Doctor's 'consider biochemical evaluation' is not supported. Measure 405.

doctor_description: Multiple bilateral nodules up to 6mm; Fleischner: CT 3–6 months (low and high risk intervals stated)
validator_description: Multiple bilateral solid nodules up to 6mm; Fleischner: CT 3–6 months (same intervals)
management_impact: None — Measure 364 satisfied by both
notes: Concordant on nodule management. Measure 364 met.

finding_category: Ground-glass nodules — mischaracterization and Fleischner follow-up
doctor_description: Two 'subsolid' nodules 4mm and 3mm (image 65); impression: no further CT follow-up required
validator_description: Two ground-glass nodules 4mm and 3mm (image 65); Fleischner: CT 3–6 months to confirm persistence, if stable CT at 2 and 4 years
management_impact: Doctor issues 'no further follow-up' for multiple RUL GGNs on first study — incorrect. Fleischner 2017 for multiple GGNs ≤5mm on first study requires CT at 3–6 months then 2 and 4 years if stable. Mandatory initial 3–6 month CT completely omitted. Measure 364 violated.
notes: Doctor labels nodules 'subsolid' and issues blanket no-follow-up. Validator identifies as pure GGNs and correctly applies Fleischner. The 3–6 month initial reassessment is required for multiple GGNs on first study.

validator_description: Wall thickening of subsegmental and segmental bronchi with secretions; impression: may represent bronchitis
management_impact: None — bronchitis contextual finding; no management change
notes: Doctor omits bronchial wall thickening with secretions (bronchitis). No management impact.

doctor_description: Mild coronary calcification (right coronary artery); PCP referral included
validator_description: Hyperdense areas at right coronary artery (may be calcifications); PCP referral included
management_impact: None — ACRad44 satisfied by both; PCP referral concordant
notes: Doctor confidently says 'mild calcification'; validator hedges with 'may be calcifications.' Both include PCP referral. ACRad44 met by both.
